rationale: No qualitative change from last cycle — Iran deal unresolved keeps energy uncertainty alive; Ukraine targeting Russian energy is a continuation; no new Black Sea escalation.

top_events.title: US-Iran deal: Trump claims Sunday signing, Tehran contradicts
top_events.summary: Unresolved Iran deal prolongs uncertainty over global oil supply, indirectly affecting Romanian energy costs. Continuation of prior cycle with no breakthrough.

top_events.title: Ukraine strikes Russian sea energy terminal
top_events.summary: Ukraine's continued strikes on Russian energy infrastructure near the Black Sea region are relevant to Romania's security environment, though no direct escalation toward Romania.

top_events.title: EU migration rules debate
top_events.summary: EU-wide migration policy discussions affect Romania as a border and transit state. No new binding rules adopted yet.
